ddls:
CREATE TABLE "category_statistics" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "adj_r_squared" REAL /* Adjusted R-squared value */,
  "std_error" REAL /* Standard error of the estimate */,
  "f_value" REAL /* F-statistic value */,
  "significance" TEXT /* Significance level (e.g., p-value) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used in the analysis */,
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Predicted value based on historical data */,
  "confidence_interval_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_interval_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id", "time_period_id", "region_id", "strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the time period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the time period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the time period was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the time period was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_time_period" (
  "category_time_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_time_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_time_period_time_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_time_period_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_region" (
  "category_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_region_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_region_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the strategy is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the strategy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the strategy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategies_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
